content: We can extend the cross-framework interoperability goal of the Agent Communication Protocol (ACP) to enable a distributed collective intrinsic curiosity system, where ACP standardizes the sharing of discovered novel state information between ICM-equipped autonomous agents to amplify collective exploration without redundant reward computation. Each agent can preserve its local ICM reward function while contributing and drawing on a shared network of novelty signals, creating a modular curiosity ecosystem that works across diverse agent frameworks.
